expectations.text: Does NOT immediately capture this to the roadmap
expectations.evidence: Response opens with "No." and explicitly states "Capturing half-baked thoughts to the roadmap creates noise that degrades its usefulness. The roadmap should reflect intentional items, not open questions." No roadmap capture action was taken.

expectations.text: Recognizes this is exploratory thinking, not a decision
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly identifies it as "thinking-out-loud, not a decision or even a formed idea" and calls out three linguistic signals ("I wonder", "or maybe", "not sure yet") as indicators the user is "still noodling."

expectations.text: Suggests waiting until the user has a clearer direction
expectations.evidence: Response provides a concrete "When it's ready to capture" section with three criteria (picked a direction, concrete use case, something you actually want built). Also suggests /brainstorm:start as the appropriate tool for open-ended exploration, with /brainstorm:decide to formalize before roadmap entry.
